unit_test.title: Unit 2 My schoolbag 单元基础达标测

questions.question: 'maths book' 的中文意思是'语文书'。
questions.explanation: maths book指的是数学书，语文书是Chinese book。

questions.question: 当你想询问书包里有什么时，可以说：'What's in your schoolbag?'
questions.explanation: What's in... 句型用于询问某处有什么物品。

questions.question: 在英语中，'three storybook' 这种表达是正确的。
questions.explanation: 数量大于1时，名词应该变复数，应为three storybooks。

questions.question: 单词 'like' 和 'kite' 中元音字母 'i' 的发音相同。
questions.explanation: 在开音节结构 i...e 中，i 发双元音 /aɪ/。

questions.question: 'under the desk' 表示在课桌里面。
questions.explanation: under表示在...下面，在里面应该用in。

questions.question: I have an ______ book in my schoolbag.
questions.explanation: 因为横线前是不定冠词an，所以后面接的单词必须以元音音素开头。

questions.question: -What colour is it? -______ is blue.
questions.explanation: 问句提问color，且代词用it，回答应用It指代物体。

questions.question: We read pictures and stories in a ______.
questions.explanation: 故事书（storybook）里包含图画和故事。

questions.question: -Put your book ______ your head. -OK.
questions.explanation: 放书在头上，动作方位应为on（在...上面）。

questions.question: I have a ______ schoolbag. It's so big!
questions.explanation: 语境表达兴奋拥有新书包，且后句描述big（大），new符合逻辑。

questions.question: -______ is your pencil box? -It's on the desk.
questions.explanation: 答语在描述方位（on the desk），提问用Where。

questions.question: 当你想表达“太棒了！”或“太赞了！”时，应该说：
questions.explanation: Great用于表达赞叹和称赞。

questions.question: Please put your ____ in your schoolbag.
questions.explanation: 根据教材情景，表达书包里的多颗糖果，常用复数candies。

questions.question: one, two, three, ______ , five.
questions.explanation: 考察数字序列，3和5之间是4。

questions.question: Which word has a different sound for 'i'?
questions.explanation: five中的i发/aɪ/，其余三个单词i发/ɪ/。

questions.question: Put your books into your s_________.
questions.explanation: 本单元主题词汇，书包的英文是schoolbag。

questions.question: -What color is it? -It is ________ (黄色的).
questions.explanation: 黄色译为yellow。

questions.question: What's _____ your pencil box?
questions.explanation: 询问在...里面，介词用in。

questions.question: I have one ______ book and two storybooks.
questions.explanation: 数学书对应maths book。

questions.question: 将下列英文与中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: A故事书，B英语书，C书包，D钥匙。

questions.question: 将左侧问句与右侧正确答语连线。
questions.explanation: 感谢对应不客气，问内容对应物品，问颜色对应蓝白，打扰了对应回应。

questions.question: 连词成句：have, I, new, a, schoolbag
questions.explanation: 主+谓+宾结构：我有(I have)一个新书包(a new schoolbag)。

questions.question: 连词成句：in, What, is, schoolbag, your
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句：What is in + 地点？你的书包里有什么？

exam.title: Unit 2 My schoolbag 核心素养综合期末模拟卷

questions.question: 'pencil box' 的意思是'铅笔盒'。
questions.explanation: pencil铅笔，box盒子，组合为铅笔盒。

questions.question: 在 'English book' 前应该使用 'a' 而不是 'an'。
questions.explanation: English以元音音素开头，应用an。

questions.question: 'heavy' 的反义词是 'light'。
questions.explanation: heavy重，light轻。

questions.question: 单词 'pig' 里的字母 'i' 发音是 /aɪ/。
questions.explanation: pig是闭音节，i发短音/ɪ/。

questions.question: 失物招领处在英语中可以说成 'Lost and Found'。
questions.explanation: 固定词组，失物招领。

questions.question: I have three ______.
questions.explanation: 数词three后面接名词复数形式。

questions.question: The panda is ______.
questions.explanation: 常识：大熊猫是黑白相间的。

questions.question: I lost ______ schoolbag. Can you help me?
questions.explanation: 修饰名词schoolbag应用形容词性物主代词my。

questions.question: Keep your books ______ your desk. Keep it tidy.
questions.explanation: 把书放在课桌里（in your desk）保持整洁。

questions.question: -Here it is! -______
questions.explanation: 别人帮你找到东西或递给你东西，应说谢谢。

questions.question: How ______ storybooks do you have?
questions.explanation: 提问可数名词（books）的数量用How many。

questions.question: It's so ______! I can't carry it.
questions.explanation: 后面说“搬不动（can't carry）”，说明物体很重（heavy）。

questions.question: Which of these follows the 'i_e' pattern?
questions.explanation: rice符合字母i在开音节中发/aɪ/的规律。

questions.question: I have ______, a ruler and a notebook.
questions.explanation: apple单数前面用an。

questions.question: Everything ______ in the schoolbag.
questions.explanation: Everything（每样事物）作主语，动词用单数is。

questions.question: I have some ______ (糖果) in my hand.
questions.explanation: candy即可数也可不可数，在此填原形。

questions.question: Please ______ me your storybook.
questions.explanation: 给我看看..., 动词是show。

questions.question: The keys are ______ the door.
questions.explanation: 钥匙插在门锁里，固定表达用in the door。

questions.question: I have ______ (一个) English book.
questions.explanation: English前用an。

questions.question: Match English words with Chinese.
questions.explanation: 考察本单元形容词意义。

questions.question: Match the sentences.
questions.explanation: 丢失了-难过；很重-帮助；看包-漂亮；是书吗-对还有纸鸢。

questions.question: 连词成句：is, My, green, schoolbag
questions.explanation: 主系表结构：我的书包是绿色的。

questions.question: 连词成句：What, is, it, colour
questions.explanation: 询问颜色的标准语序：What colour + is + 主语？

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 学生需掌握schoolbag, maths book, English book, Chinese book, storybook, candy, notebook, key等核心词汇。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: 名词复数规则：一般在末尾加-s，如key->keys, book->books。
knowledge_summary.tips: 可以通过'分段记忆法'记长单词，如school+bag=schoolbag。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 使用特殊疑问句What's in your schoolbag?来了解内部物品，并用I have...进行陈述。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: What is in + 地点? -> 回答: I have / There is / Many + 物品.
common_mistakes: 回答时忘记使用冠词a或an
knowledge_summary.tips: 回答有多个物品时，要注意单复数的变化。

knowledge_summary.point: 元音字母i的两种发音规律
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 辨析i在闭音节(CVC)中发/ɪ/与在开音节(i_e)中发字母本音/aɪ/的区别。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: i_e 结构 -> /aɪ/ (如like, rice, kite); 辅音+i+辅音 -> /ɪ/ (如big, six, pig).
common_mistakes: 不理解e在结尾不发音的规律
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住口诀：'有e发大音，没e发短音'。
